The State Attorney’s Office determined the SWAT officer's use of deadly force was legally justified.

title: USF marine science fire: St. Pete recovery operations save vital scientific research despite heavy damage
summary: University leaders announced that recovery operations have yielded remarkably successful results two months after a lightning fire heavily damaged the University of South Florida St. Petersburg's College of Marine Science in May.

title: Will Florida see its next named storm this weekend?
summary: Forecasters are tracking a broad disturbance in the Gulf of Mexico off the Florida coast that could bring much-needed rain to parched communities this weekend.

title: Security at the World Cup final ramped up for Sunday's Argentina-Spain match

title: RFK Jr. to join Florida agriculture leaders to discuss orange juice standards

title: Hillsborough County announces reduced in-class screen time for K-2 students
summary: Hillsborough County Public Schools (HCPS) announced new guidelines to reduce screen time in K-2 classrooms.

title: A 7.3 earthquake hits Mexico-Guatemala border with no immediate damage reported
summary: A strong earthquake struck the southern Mexican Pacific coast on Friday, right on the border with Guatemala, and was felt from Mexico City to El Salvador.

title: 1-on-1 with Rays analyst Brian Anderson
summary: Brian Anderson breaks down how Junior Caminero's growth, a versatile lineup, and a mid-season pitching move have Tampa Bay in first place entering the second half.

summary: North Port police said a 5-year-old girl has been hospitalized after an accident on Thursday afternoon.

title: Target recalls specific Cat & Jack children’s sandals due to choking hazard
summary: A recall has been issued by Target for Cat & Jack-branded children’s sandals. According to the United States Consumer Product Safety Commission, the sandals have decorative pearls which can fall off.

title: Oscar winner Brenda Fricker, known for ‘My Left Foot’ and ‘Home Alone 2,’ dies
summary: Oscar-winning actor Brenda Fricker, who played Christy Brown’s mother in “My Left Foot” and the pigeon lady in “Home Alone 2,” has died at 81.
